26.code: for(p=Wordlist; p != NULL; p=p->link) //遍历输出单词表
26.reason: This for loop is misplaced; it should be after the while loop, not inside it. Also, searchWord is never called, so Wordlist remains empty.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [This for loop is incorrectly placed inside the while loop due to missing braces, leading to output after every word read instead of after all words are processed]

25.code: while( getWord(bfp,word) != EOF) //从文件中读入一个单词
25.reason: The loop body incorrectly skips calling searchWord to insert and count words, and instead immediately starts printing the list repeatedly.
